subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast circled round the celestial Sanctuary of the Concourse on High! Praise be to God that thou didst traverse desert and wilderness until thou didst attain unto the chalice of the Covenant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من طاف حول مطاف الملا الاعلی الحمد لله صحرا و بادیه پیمودی تا پیمانه پیمان
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @Shrines and Holy places, @firmness in the Covenant
